highlights.text: Private Lake Pichola sunset solar boat cruise
City Palace, Monsoon Palace, Bagore-ki-Haveli cultural show
CP plan with welcome drink and honeymoon amenities

itinerary.title: Udaipur Romance Luxury Tour
itinerary.tagline: Udaipur Romance Tour — City of Lakes & Palaces
itinerary.overview: Udaipur, acclaimed as the Venice of the East, is a mesmerizing oasis of white marble palaces, tranquil azure lakes, and breathtaking landscapes. This meticulously curated honeymoon package transforms your escape into a royal fairytale with premium handpicked hotels, private luxury transportation, and highly curated romantic experiences. Route: Udaipur arrival → Lake Pichola cruise → City Palace → Monsoon Palace → departure. Meal plan: CP (Bed & Breakfast). Best season: October to March.
itinerary.seo_title: RJ-004 | Udaipur Romance Luxury Tour | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Luxury 03 Nights / 04 Days Udaipur honeymoon (RJ-004): private Lake Pichola sunset cruise, City Palace, Saheliyon-ki-Bari, Sajjangarh Monsoon Palace, and Bagore-ki-Haveli folk show.

highlights.text: Private Lake Pichola sunset solar boat cruise
TRAGUIN Signature twilight cruise with onboard musician

days.title: Udaipur Arrival | Royal Reception & Private Lake Pichola Sunset Cruise
days.description: Private chauffeur welcome with cold towels and floral bouquet. Check-in at premium hotel. Exclusive private solar boat cruise on Lake Pichola past Lake Palace at sunset. Exquisite lakeside dinner.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Lake Pichola, Gangaur Ghat, Ambrai Viewpoint
Optional Activities: Couples' traditional aromatherapy spa session at the hotel
Evening Experience: Ultra-luxury lakeside dinner featuring authentic Mewari cuisine
Overnight Stay: Handpicked Premium Luxury Hotel / Resort in Udaipur

days.title: Udaipur Sightseeing | Monumental Romance & Grand City Palace
days.description: Full-day Udaipur sightseeing with heritage guide: City Palace, Crystal Gallery, Saheliyon-ki-Bari, and Jagdish Temple. Romantic walk through old city markets.
activities: Sightseeing Included: City Palace, Crystal Gallery, Saheliyon-ki-Bari, Jagdish Temple
Optional Activities: Private professional vintage photoshoot in royal Mewari costumes
Evening Experience: Panoramic views and coffee at boutique cafe overlooking Fateh Sagar Lake
Overnight Stay: Handpicked Premium Luxury Hotel / Resort in Udaipur

days.title: Sajjangarh Palace & Culture | Monsoon Palace Vista & Mewari Cultural Show
days.description: Visit Sajjangarh Monsoon Palace for sweeping lake views. Afternoon at Bagore-ki-Haveli for vibrant Rajasthani folk dance and puppet show. Romantic candlelight rooftop dinner.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Sajjangarh Monsoon Palace, Biological Park, Bagore-ki-Haveli
Optional Activities: Private pottery making workshop and rural art tour at Shilpgram
Evening Experience: Vibrant live cultural dance performance at Bagore-ki-Haveli
Overnight Stay: Handpicked Premium Luxury Hotel / Resort in Udaipur

days.title: Departure | Souvenir Collection & Cherished Farewell
days.description: Leisurely breakfast, last-minute shopping at Bada Bazaar and Hathi Pol, and private transfer to Udaipur airport or railway station with customized farewell token.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Local craft emporiums and shopping bazaars (Bada Bazaar, Hathi Pol)
Optional Activities: Quick mid-day luxury high tea before heading to the terminal
Evening Experience: Flawless departure transfer assist

hotels.name: The Leela Palace Udaipur / Taj Lake Palace
The Oberoi Udaivilas

inclusions.text: Luxury accommodations at chosen handpicked tier hotels (3 nights)
Daily buffet breakfast featuring international and local options
Private luxury AC sedan for all transfers, excursions, and sightseeing
Exclusive private sunset boat cruise on Lake Pichola curated by TRAGUIN
Professional English-speaking local heritage guide for City Palace tour
24/7 on-call backend concierge support from TRAGUIN
Traditional welcome amenities, custom floral arrangements, and honeymoon cake
All applicable state taxes, parking fees, toll fees, and driver allowances
Domestic or international airfares / train tickets
Monument entrance tickets and camera fees
Mandatory dynamic gala dinners during Christmas, New Year, or peak festivals
Personal expenses: laundry, mini-bar, telephone calls, and gratuities
Optional adventure tours, premium water sports, or extra sightseeing trips
